summary: Iteration 120 - Dashboard Power Features: All 3 tasks verified. (A) Real sparklines on StatCards from analyticsApi.getMonthlyTrend(), (B) NeedsAttentionSection component showing leads needing immediate action, (C) RevenueGoalWidget with localStorage-based annual revenue goal tracking. TypeScript and build checks pass with 0 errors. Browser tests confirm all features visible and functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 tasks verified. Dashboard Power Features working correctly. Test user is PHOTOGRAPHY industry.

TASK_A_imports.details: Dashboard.tsx imports analyticsApi, DashboardAnalytics, MonthlyTrendData from api.ts (line 27)

TASK_A_state_variables.details: Dashboard.tsx has analytics (line 154) and monthlyTrend (line 155) state variables with correct types

TASK_A_api_calls.details: Dashboard.tsx calls analyticsApi.getDashboard() and analyticsApi.getMonthlyTrend() in init (lines 214-215)

TASK_A_sparklines.details: All 4 StatCards use toSparkline() helper (lines 970, 981, 992, 1003). No hardcoded placeholder arrays or TODO comments. Browser test found 9 sparkline SVGs.

TASK_A_booked_trend.details: Booked card trend.direction uses bookedTrend variable (line 1002) which is derived from analytics?.overview.bookedThisMonth.changePercent (lines 167-169)

TASK_A_statcard_unchanged.details: StatCard.tsx is unchanged (116 lines, same interfaces: TrendData, SparklinePoint, StatCardProps)

TASK_B_filters.details: NeedsAttentionSection filters out isDemoData and LOST leads in Dashboard.tsx needsAttention derivation (line 174)

TASK_B_cap_5_items.details: NeedsAttentionSection caps at 5 items max via .slice(0, 5) (line 188). Browser test confirmed 5 items visible.

TASK_B_clickable_rows.details: Each row is a button element (line 66) that calls onLeadClick

TASK_B_lang_parameter.details: Reason labels use lang parameter (lines 19, 24, 29) - e.g., lang.quote, lang.contract

TASK_B_conditional_render.details: Section only renders when items.length > 0 (line 48: if (items.length === 0) return null)

TASK_B_dashboard_render.details: Dashboard.tsx renders NeedsAttentionSection above StatCards grid (line 955-961), only in kanban/list viewMode

TASK_C_empty_state.details: Widget shows empty state when goal === 0 with 'Set your revenue goal' text (line 83). Browser test confirmed.

TASK_C_progress_bar.details: Widget shows progress bar when goal is set (lines 126-137)

TASK_C_animation.details: Progress bar animates with CSS transition on width (line 133: transition: 'width 800ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)')

TASK_C_edit_mode.details: Edit mode is inline with input + Save/Cancel buttons (lines 37-70)

TASK_C_sidebar_placement.details: Widget placed in right sidebar above OnboardingChecklist in Dashboard.tsx (lines 1289-1296)

TASK_C_bookedThisYear_prop.details: bookedThisYear prop wired from analytics state (line 1290: bookedThisYear={analytics?.overview.bookedThisYear.value ?? 0})

login_flow.details: bookingtest@test.com / password123 works and reaches /dashboard with new features visible
